## Description
What does this change do and why?

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance

## Testing
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] New tests added for this change

## Review Notes
What should reviewers focus on? Any trade-offs made?
